name: Computational Design Skills
description: A Claude Code skills plugin for computational designers, covering 18 AEC skills from parametric modeling to structural computation with 7 Python calculators.
author: Claude Skills Maintainer

install.notes: No slash commands required. Skills auto-activate based on user intent.

skills.name: bim-scripting
skills.description: BIM automation and scripting (Revit, IFC, Dynamo).

skills.name: cd-calculator
skills.description: Calculator scripts for geometry, materials, and structural checks.

skills.name: cd-foundations
skills.description: Core computational design concepts and workflows.

skills.name: data-driven-design
skills.description: Integration of GIS, sensors, and spatial data analytics.

skills.name: design-automation
skills.description: Rule-based layout, space planning and automation patterns.

skills.name: digital-fabrication
skills.description: CNC, additive and robotic fabrication processes.

skills.name: environmental-simulation
skills.description: Energy, CFD, daylight, and acoustic simulation methods.

skills.name: mesh-processing
skills.description: Mesh operations, repair, and quality improvement.

skills.name: ml-for-aec
skills.description: Computer vision, generative models, and prediction for AEC.

skills.name: scripting-reference
skills.description: Scripting APIs, syntax, and ecosystem references.

skills.name: structural-computation
skills.description: Form-finding, FEA, and structural calculation knowledge.
